title: habenaria japonica
intro: Habenaria japonica, also known as the Japanese orchid or Japanese Habenaria, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and soothing digestive problems. In traditional herbal preparations, Habenaria japonica is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
